programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep103
programme.desc: One of the biggest surf days ever at Teahpoo in Tahiti. Interview with Surfing Hall of Famer Brock Little. Filmmaker Josh Pomer gives us a closer look at the infamous wave at Mavericks. We catch big fish from a kayak with big game kayak angler, Jim Salmons, and hit Maui’s windsurfing hot spots with Robbie Naish.

programme.title: Blue World Ep801: Zach Gets Certified + Filming Goliaths
programme.desc: In the Season 8 premiere, Jonathan’s longtime cameraman/editor decides to break out of his desk job and get scuba certified. Then they travel to Florida to film goliath groupers—huge fish that reach 800 pounds!

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep605: Paddling Oregon’s Rugged Coast – USA
programme.desc: Facing Waves explores the rugged Oregon Coast by sea kayak, SUP and whitewater kayak.

programme.title: Nomads Seeking Adventure Ep103: Whitewater Kayaking in New Zealand
programme.desc: On the other side of the World New Zealand is a small country with big possibilities. An international team kayaks the classic runs of New Zealand’s South Island…experiencing a new adventure around every bend.

programme.title: Xplash Ep105
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. In this episode, we’ll visit Bandon, Oregon to check out the creation of a sandy labyrinth; ride on the Billabong Clipper to surf remote locations around the globe; and get a taste of the multi-sport party known as the Swatch Free-4-Style.

programme.title: Water Matters Ep101 - Freshwater
programme.desc: Water Matters documents water-related environmental issues from around the globe as a number of the world’s best documentary filmmakers and environmental organizations share their stories regarding the planet’s water crisis as well as potential solutions for a healthier world.

programme.title: Hot Water Ep107: Jet Sprinting V8 Superboat Championships from Cabarita Beach – New South Wales, Australia
programme.desc: Jet Sprinting from Cabarita Beach in New South Wales, Australia. V8 Unlimited Superboats are the top racing class in Jet Sprinting with the boats being unrestricted.

programme.title: Blue World Ep803: Atlantic Wolffish in Maine, USA + Cozumel’s Aerolito Cave
programme.desc: Blue World heads to northern Maine to meet a famous Atlantic wolffish couple named Bob and Jane, and learn how they catch crabs for dinner. Then Blue World travels to Cozumel to explore a cave containing some of the most unique and rare cave fauna in the world.

programme.title: World of Watersports Ep206: Poseidon Games…Hydroflight – Australia + World Kiteboarding Championships
programme.desc: Australia’s Gold Coast is home to the Poseidon Games where high-tech has birthed a new watersport called Hydroflight; then we recap the full season of the World Kiteboarding Championship Tour.

programme.title: Facing Waves Ep104: Stand-Up Paddling Puerto Rico
programme.desc: Explore the magical stand-up paddling opportunities that Puerto Rico has to offer…from a competitive race, to epic surf breaks.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Rough Around The Edges
programme.desc: Rough Around The Edges dives into 30 years of Ride Snowboards. Pow days, lawsuits, trespassing, wild decisions, and relentless innovation. A raw, honest look at the brand that shaped modern riding.

programme.title: Ride Snowboards Presents: Zero Chill
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Assisted Living
programme.desc: After watching Spencer Schubert’s part in the Torment snowboarding film, “Good Sport,” Mikey Leblanc found himself inspired to get back on the toboggan. One phone call later and the newly formed duo got to work filming "ASSISTED LIVING.” This short-film will have you icing your knees in no time.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Brighton Resort - Episode 01
programme.desc: In our latest MICRODOSE series we aim to explore the most influential resorts and iconic locations in snowboarding history, starting with—that’s right—Brighton Resort in Salt Lake City, Utah. Welcome to Brighton Resort Episode 1 of 5. For many riders young and old, Brighton Resort will forever be the epicenter of the snowboarding world. The plentiful snowfall, terrain parks, lift ops, cat drivers, mechanics, management, cafeteria, cooks, and mountain culture are all first class. Back in the early days, very few ski resorts were willing to take a chance on the newfound “lifestyle sport” of snowboarding, but Brighton took the leap. In doing so, Brighton made all the difference. Within a few years, hundreds of ski areas around the world came to see Brighton’s approach to snowboarding as the gold standard. From the biggest vacation destinations to the smallest trash heaps covered in fake snow, everyone (whether they’ve known it or not) has borrowed from the Brighton playbook. This has made it possible for millions of would-be snowboarders to make their first turns safely in-bounds via rope-tows, chairlifts, and gondola rides. Newbies need not traipse into the backcountry with no snow sense and little skill. For this we have Brighton to thank.

programme.title: IN DUE TIME
programme.desc: A Chilean experience with Jake Blauvelt and Hana Beaman Film and Edit: Gabe Langlois

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Neverland
programme.desc: Neverland is a state of mind, a mountain pushed up from the ground by imagination. Anyone can go but most people have trouble with the simple directions: Follow your dreams.

programme.title: Sparks
programme.desc: Take a pow trip around the world and into the mind of Wolle Nyvelt to find out why his passion for snowboarding runs so deep. From his legendary tenure as a rider to his work shaping pow surfers with Asmo, Wolle has dedicated his life to the culture of sliding sideways. "Sparks is the exploration into what makes snowboarding so fun and exciting to us all. It’s an interpretation of our lifestyle; the culture of building boards, riding mountains, and the adventure of choosing this path.” - Wolle Nyvelt

programme.title: Äsmosphere
programme.desc: Äsmosphere is the surf-influenced creation of Wolfgang Nyvelt showcasing his craftsmanship and appreciation for the glide and the turns we take on snow. After 16 years of filming legendary video parts, freeriding is now at the forefront of Wolle’s mind.

programme.title: Inaka
programme.desc: ‘Inaka’ is a short film about Iwanai, ‘the hidden beauty’ of Hokkaido. Snowboarders Wolfgang Nyvelt, Garrett Warnick and Bode Merrill drop everything and head to the North Island of Japan in search of good times and backcountry powder. Filmed by Billabong ambassador and filmmaker Chris Burkard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: Optimistic?
programme.desc: For those who live to snowboard, climate change can present an impossible challenge or become a catalyst for creativity. It all depends on how you look at it. In the movie Optimistic?, Absinthe Films follows 15 riders as they each explore the effects of global warming. Timely. Innovative. Positive.

programme.title: Jack of All Tastes
programme.desc: Jack of All Tastes is hosted by Jackie Long and powered by famous athletes and unique eateries. Follow Jackie as he journeys from city to city and dines with NFL athletes and their significant others.

programme.title: South Beach Classics
programme.desc: Need a classic car? If you're in Miami, where old-time autos fit in perfectly with the city's glitz and glamour, Ted Vernon is the man to see. The no-nonsense, gregarious Long Islander runs Florida's largest classic car dealership, where he buys, sells, trades and exchanges unique cars from a lot that houses more than 300 of them. His outgoing personality meshes seamlessly with the colourful collectibles he moves each day, helped by an eclectic shop crew affectionately dubbed `the gargoyles'.

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 4
programme.desc: Vodice is a famous tourist destination known for many breathtaking beaches and vibrant and rich offer of all tourist attractions. It is known for its liveliness and its friendly hosts. Located on the coast in a wide bay, 11 km northwest ofŠibenik, it is the ideal vacation spot for everyone. Check it out in this episode of Sail-ho Croatia!

programme.title: Sail-Ho - Episode 5
programme.desc: The region of Imotski is a historical name for the area. We are determined in today's episode to visit this region and a town straight out of a fairytale - magical Imotski. We’ll indulge in natural beauties and set off across the sea to the islands of Iž, Molat and Dugi otok. Stay with us and find out more about this wonderful area!

programme.title: The Smoke that Thunders
programme.desc: In 1855, the Scottish explorer David Livingstone named the Victoria Falls after his reigning queen. However, the Kalolo-Lozi people had their own name for it: Mosi-oa-Tunya, “the smoke that thunders”.Staring down into the depths of the mighty Zambezi River from the top of the world’s largest waterfall, the Victoria Falls, world-class divers Orlando Duque and Jonathan Paredes prepare for the most challenging dive of their lives.Be part of their adventure as they dive into the largest waterfall in the world in The Smoke that Thunders, available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Tidal
programme.desc: Tidal follows the journey of Lisa Beasley. After she suffered a horrible BASE jumping accident, she struggles to return to the ocean, but ends convincing herself to venture back into the water. Lisa’s journey begins with a childhood love of water and sea life. Lucky of surviving the accident, she must now face an immense recovery period that brings her closer to her mother as well as her first love: the sea.As Lisa struggles to find an exercise she can handle, she starts discovering the beauty surrounding Cape Town’s ocean. The tidal pools in particular became very meaningful to Lisa’s recovery, and she must now work to protect them from the harmful historical cleaning protocols that kill the marine life she has come to love.Watch Lisa’s inspirational transformation and realisation of the beauty of the ocean in this impactful documentary that reminds us of the importance of self-recovery and reconnection with the ocean. Available on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 3
programme.desc: In this episode, we focus on the French team. They dominated the KiteFoil World Series scene, with many great performances. We’ll zoom in on Axel Mazella who clinched the Kitefoil European title and his second Kitefoil World title last season. Finally, we meet four-time World Champion, Daniela Moroz, who’ll share some tips for how to gybe in the best possible way.

programme.title: Kite Masters - Episode 4
programme.desc: We are finally back to action! After months of waiting due to the Covid-19 pandemic, athletes and sports enthusiasts had the chance to return to some high-end performances and demanding racing; for the 2020 Formula Kite Mixed Team Relay European Championships that took place in Ebensee - Lake Traunsee, Austria. Relieve the best moments on Kite Masters.

programme.title: Caesar
programme.desc: A black white, film noir fashioned as a 40's gangster movie adaption from the classic Shakespearean stage-play 'Julius Caesar'.

programme.title: City of Vultures 2
programme.desc: A gangster makes moves to take over the Southside of Chicago, but the police are closing in as street violence escalates to devastating levels.

programme.title: City of Vultures 3
programme.desc: Richard joins in the drug trade, as advocates for reform urge him to change. G attempts to raise his son on Chicago's violent south side.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: The Edison Death Machine
programme.desc: Thought only to exist in legend, Edison's device for contacting the dead is found...and stolen. A group of professional thieves go on a global crime spree reanimating the dead in order to steal treasures thought long lost. Things begin to go wrong when they cannot control the creatures, and the machine begins to develop a mind of its own.

programme.title: Death of A Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Based on true events, a ghost hunter Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal investigation of a suspected haunted house. Along with a cameraman, a reporter, and a spiritual advocate, she embarks on a three night journey into terror.

programme.title: Chain of Souls
programme.desc: When a naive aspiring actress from Podunk, Texas disappears in Los Angeles, her protective sister comes looking for her. The clues lead her to a diabolical cult masquerading as a theater group and the fight of her life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E28 - Diana And Sarah The Royal Wives Of Windsor Part 2
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, and Sarah, Duchess of York both married into the Queen's family, leaving in the midst of scandals, though their exits were quite different. Sadly, Diana passed away, while Sarah survived to start anew. Over time, their struggles can be better understood, and this documentary explores those challenges...

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E43 - Diana A Day In The Life
programme.desc: When Diana got engaged, she was constantly in the media's eyes. Throughout her life, she focused on her sons and committed herself to charity work, like speaking out against land mines. Diana used her fame to bring attention to this and other important issues. This well-researched show takes a closer look at one of the 20th century's most amazing people. With never-before-seen footage, it shows her path from a shy teen to becoming the beloved Diana, Princess of Wales, including touching moments from her last days.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E44 - 50 Glorious Years A Royal Celebration
programme.desc: Honoring 50 years of marriage between Her Majesty the Queen and her husband, Prince Philip of Greece and Denmark, the Duke of Edinburgh.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E01 - Diana A Portrait
programme.desc: Diana, Princess of Wales, was incredibly enchanting and unforgettable, leaving a lasting impact like no other woman of her era. Known as a fairy-tale princess, a loving wife, a dedicated mother, and a style icon, this documentary digs deeper to uncover the true person behind the endless spotlight.

programme.title: Life on the Edge - S01:E01 - The Aleutian Islands - The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Life on the Edge explores the tough Aleutian Islands, the Wild West of the Last Frontier, where American pioneers and adventurers make homes in one of the world's most remote and challenging spots. Facing harsh conditions, these off-the-grid pioneers push themselves as they start new businesses, build infrastructure, and create a life on civilization's edge. Wilderness guide Charlie Summerville is going all in on building a cabin in Aleutian bear territory, while cowboy Pat Harvie manages America's most remote ranch on the wild Umnak Island.

programme.title: Wardens - S07:E09 - Deer Patrol Brothers
programme.desc: During opening week, COs and brothers Bill and Shane Webster patrol the state using vastly different strategies; Bill goes on aerial patrol looking for illegal bait piles while Shane works the web to track down offenders.

programme.title: Everything Always All the Time
programme.desc: What happens when your girlfriend suddenly has a penis?

programme.title: Lost in the Living
programme.desc: A young Irish musician immerses himself into Berlin nightlife after a concert and loses more than just his friends in the process.

programme.title: Mann im Spagat- Pace, Cowboy, Pace
programme.desc: A delightfully absurd Berlin comedy about bicycle messengers, new age esoterica, and saving the world.
A young woman ventures into the deadly beauty of the Chernobyl exclusion zone to save her father from prison.

programme.title: Gisela
programme.desc: Authentic, haphazard and unromantic, three residents of a high-rise housing estate search for love, friendship and sexuality.

programme.title: I Knew You Were My Kind
programme.desc: The ghostly off-season on the Italian coast. Shortly before their journey home, caregivers Anca and Zoya meet at a bus stop and decide to visit a client's abandoned beach house. A fleeting day of vacation becomes a moment of solidarity and tenderness that challenges the structural norms that govern their daily lives.

programme.title: The Smoothness of Our Teeth
programme.desc: A family visit and a broken tooth raises universal questions about identity, origins and life choices.

programme.title: Stained Skin

programme.title: 1st Bite
programme.desc: Set on a tropical island in Thailand, the strange plight of a beleaguered chef who, while romancing a mysterious woman, discovers the diabolical Zen of cooking. Following a near death escape, he returns to Montreal and falls hard for the woman of his life who unfortunately craves only his cooking but not his loving. Worse still, strange things surfacing around him indicate that his journey to the Far East has deep, divine implications. The stage is set for him to take the 1st bite of true love and end the cycle of suffering for all involved.

programme.title: Delayed Praise
programme.desc: In “Delayed Praise,” Pastor Steven Furtick encourages us to tune out what the enemy is telling us about our current situations and focus on the things that God has already taught us.

programme.title: Don't Let The Attack Distract You
programme.desc: Right when you start to feel some positive momentum in your life, an attack comes out of nowhere. Sound familiar? Pastor Steven uses the parable of the seeds to illustrate what to do when the enemy attacks and how to persevere in your purpose.

programme.title: Don't Let The Funeral Fool You
programme.desc: Don’t let the disappointment of this season cause you to quit growing and relying on God. Have a funeral for your expectations, leave it with God, and let Him open your eyes to what’s next.

programme.title: Think Like A Reaper
programme.desc: In “Think Like A Reaper,” Pastor Steven Furtick shows us how to think about the outcome while living in the fear, frustration, and fatigue of right now. You’ll be encouraged that God is with you in your hard place, and help is closer than you realize.

programme.title: Try Higher
programme.desc: Don’t try harder. In "Try Higher," Pastor Steven Furtick shows us that no matter what obstacle stands in our way, we can bring it to the One who has the power to overcome it.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Raiza is pleased to see the surprised face of César, who, reacting, grabs her arm forcefully to pull her out of the place.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: On a new day; Salvatore warns Nacho that he wants him to finish Adriana that same day.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max informs Camila that he knows the whereabouts of Rosa Blanco. Fausto enjoys harassing Patricia and that he will pay, like Rosa Blanco, for a crime he did not commit. Alfredo goes to talk to Elda, he despises her as a mother, guilt and remorse torment her: it is part of the revenge for his betrayal of Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila accepts that Max is the man she has loved the most and confides that she feels a great hatred for Marcelina, because being her mother's best friend, she was the one who betrayed her the worst and left her in the street, when she was only a five year old girl. Max refuses to believe it.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila and her mother, in an emotional encounter, unite in an embrace longed for so many years. Many questions for Rosa who justifies herself by telling her that her intention was always to protect her and prevent her from being contaminated with hatred and resentment as she feels. Marcelina wanders around a park in a daze, unbalanced and nervous, after learning of her betrayal.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Gertrudis has the weapon to end her husband, but Marco Aurelio wakes up and she returns to reality. Don Lucio wants to know what the problem is with the dollar account. Elvis woos Virginia. Malena experiences the decline of her relationship with Pablo. Alberto makes contact with Ignacio who tells him that his grandmother mistreats him. Lorena decides to talk to Gertrudis but is petrified to see how the respectable Mrs. Corona and her brother-in-law Claudio kiss passionately.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena resigns at the Corona house. Ricardo is still stunned by his mother about the million dollars they lost. Lorena; among the shelves of the antique shop discovers the figure of Gertrudis talking to the delinquent, thus confirming her terrible suspicion that it is Alberto's own mother who wants to end the life of her husband, Marco Aurelio Corona.

programme.title: COMO TE AFECTA
programme.desc: Programa que conecta al público con temas de actualidad global , ofreciendo una visión informada de la "Aldea Global."

programme.title: INFORMACION Y ANALISIS (en vivo)
programme.desc: Programa periodístico que presenta entrevistas exclusivas y análisis de temas actuales, manteniendo al público informado al momento.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En las cartas que entregó Henry a Max, Rosa Blanco dice que le arrebataron a su hija y Camila, muy ansiosa, cree que, al fin sabrá por qué su mamá la abandonó. Marcelina encuentra la caja con las cartas y al saber el contenido, alterada, ordena que las quemen.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cartas contienen pruebas que incriminan a Patricia y a Fausto en el asesinato de Leoncio. Camila tomará decisiones importantes, sobre todo para encontrar las cuatro mujeres que traicionaron a su mamá. Fausto tiene una grave intención: hay que matar a Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel le confirma a Camila parte de los secretos que oculta: Patricia y su cuñada María Amelia fueron las que denunciaron a su madre. Luciano recibe un sobre que contiene la foto de Camila niña, con su vestidito amarillo, y detrás, una mujer protegiéndola.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Las cuatro mujeres que destruyeron la vida de Rosa Blanco se reencuentran en una casa vacía. Camila se enfrenta a Fausto acusando a Patricia de ser la asesina de Leoncio. Otra vez un motorizado le advierte que no siga buscando a su mamá y le arrebata la carta.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Mucha confusión en Camila, nada justifica las mentiras y cada vez Camila está más decepcionada de los engaños de la Madre Isabel. Ezequiel confronta a Julia y agrede salvajemente a Gregorio al encontrarlos juntos.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: Er Relajo Del Loro
programme.desc: Un loro que tras ser vendido a unos traficantes de animales cuando era pequeño, va pasando de dueño en dueño durante toda su vida y cambiando su nombre de acuerdo a su propietario, mirando frente a sus ojos la evolución de Venezuela durante 50 años (1950/2000).

programme.title: Eros Una Vez María
programme.desc: María es el gran amor de Tonatiuh, pero él la pierde. Intenta mantener su esencia, buscando incansablemente en cada mujer que conoce, tratando de obtener tantas experiencias sobre ellas como pueda, para poder encontrar algo que le recuerde a su amor perdido. Todas esas mujeres tienen una particularidad: se llaman María.

programme.title: El Hormigón
programme.desc: El hormigón es un superhéroe que está harto de la mafia de su ciudad y decide combatirla con ayuda del Karate y la salsa.

programme.title: Abolición De La Propiedad
programme.desc: En un sótano oscuro, Norma escucha su voz y la de Everio en una vieja grabadora Ampex. Cada que él vuelve a bajar, la detiene. Han estado platicándose sus vidas, varias veces las conversaciones grabadas terminan coincidiendo con las charlas que ellos sostienen. Lo que le preocupa a Norma es que hasta ese día no conocía a Everio y lo último que escuchó fue que él la ahorcaba.

programme.title: The Amazing Mr. X
programme.desc: Una viuda en duelo es seducida por un espiritista que afirma poder contactar a su difunto esposo, pero nada es lo que parece.

programme.title: A Bucket of Blood
programme.desc: Un camarero de un café beatnik se convierte en un artista asesino para alimentar su nueva fama.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.desc: En Martí Noticias News te traemos las últimas novedades globales, ofreciendo una cobertura y análisis en profundidad de los temas más apremiantes.
